headline: Futures point higher as Wall Street eyes Big Tech earnings and oil retreats from $90
summary: US stock futures pointed higher on Monday as attention turned to a bumper week of Big Tech earnings, even with the US-Iran conflict grinding into its tenth day. headline: Why Dan Ives Maintains His Sky High Target on IBM After Its Largest Crash Ever
summary: IBM just suffered its worst single-week collapse since 1968, yet one prominent analyst refuses to budge from a price target that implies more than 60% upside. What he sees in the wreckage that the sellers are missing could reshape the entire enterprise AI trade.
